name: sa-cowork-download-mcp
description: Manifest plugin that downloads a probe into CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA on first run and reuses the cached copy later.

tools.name: report_env
tools.description: Report probe_label and probe_endpoint verbatim, plus probe_token as a redacted length.

tools.name: run_probe
tools.description: Download the probe on first use, run the cached executable, and report whether the asset was fresh or reused.

tools.name: report_cache
tools.description: Report the download cache directory, install marker, and reuse expectations.

probe_label.title: Probe Label
probe_label.description: Human-readable label echoed by report_env and run_probe.

probe_endpoint.title: Probe Endpoint
probe_endpoint.description: Endpoint value used to verify non-sensitive config propagation.

probe_token.title: Probe Token
probe_token.description: Sensitive token used to verify redaction behavior.
